description: Describes an Amazon RDS DB snapshot

dBSnapshotIdentifier.description: The identifier for the DB snapshot

dBInstanceIdentifier.description: The DB instance identifier of the source DB instance

snapshotCreateTime.description: The time when the snapshot was taken

engine.description: The database engine for the snapshot

engineVersion.description: The version of the database engine

status.description: The status of the DB snapshot

allocatedStorage.description: The allocated storage size in GiB

port.description: The port that the database engine was listening on at snapshot time

availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone where the snapshot was created

vpcId.description: The VPC ID associated with the DB snapshot

instanceCreateTime.description: The time when the source DB instance was created

masterUsername.description: The master username for the DB snapshot

snapshotType.description: The type of the DB snapshot

encrypted.description: Whether the DB snapshot is encrypted

storageType.description: The storage type associated with the DB snapshot

dBSnapshotArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB snapshot

tags.description: Tags assigned to the DB snapshot

name: DBSnapshot
